stemHtml: According to OPS regulations, for acclimatised crews, the maximum daily Flight Duty Period (FDP) can be extended by the operator by up to…

options.a: 3 hours, but not more than once in any 10 consecutive days.
options.b: 1 hour, but not more than twice in any 7 consecutive days.
options.c: 4 hours, but not more than twice in any 7 consecutive days.
options.d: 2 hours, but not more than once in any 10 consecutive days.
